title: malva × litoralis
intro: Malva × litoralis, also known as the sea mallow, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malva × litoralis include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Malva × litoralis can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and dried flowers that can be used in soups or as a poultice.
